description: Multi-VM Node Exporter Dashboard with friendly alias selector

targets.expr: 100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node", alias="$alias", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node", alias="$alias", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100)

title: Prometheus Node — Multi-VM Health
